verses.latin_vulgate: Loquente Ephraim, horror invasit Israël ;  et deliquit in Baal, et mortuus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּדַבֵּ֤ר אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ רְתֵ֔ת נָשָׂ֥א ה֖וּא בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיֶּאְשַׁ֥ם בַּבַּ֖עַל וַיָּמֹֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: When Ephraim spoke, a horror seized Israel: and he sinned in Baal, and died.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Ephraim puhui, niin siitä tuli pelko; hän korotti itsensä Israelissa, ja teki syntiä Baalimin kautta, ja kuoli.
verses.king_james: When Ephraim spake trembling, he exalted himself in Israel; but when he offended in Baal, he died.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc addiderunt ad peccandum ;  feceruntque sibi conflatile de argento suo  quasi similitudinem idolorum :  factura artificum totum est :  his ipsi dicunt : Immolate homines, vitulos adorantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֣ה ׀ יוֹסִ֣פוּ לַחֲטֹ֗א וַיַּעֲשׂ֣וּ לָהֶם֩ מַסֵּכָ֨ה מִכַּסְפָּ֤ם כִּתְבוּנָם֙ עֲצַבִּ֔ים מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה חָרָשִׁ֖ים כֻּלֹּ֑ה לָהֶם֙ הֵ֣ם אֹמְרִ֔ים זֹבְחֵ֣י אָדָ֔ם עֲגָלִ֖ים יִשָּׁקֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now they have sinned more and more: and they have made to themselves a molten thing of their silver as the likeness of idols: the whole is the work of craftsmen: to these that say: Sacrifice men, ye that adore calves.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nyt he vielä enemmin syntiä tekevät, ja valavat kuvia hopiastansa, ymmärryksensä jälkeen epäjumalia, joka kaikki sepän työ on; joista he saarnaavat: Joka tahtoo niiden vasikkain suuta antaa, sen pitää ihmisiä uhraaman.
verses.king_james: And now they sin more and more, and have made them molten images of their silver, and idols according to their own understanding, all of it the work of the craftsmen: they say of them, Let the men that sacrifice kiss the calves.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco erunt quasi nubes matutina,  et sicut ros matutinus præteriens ;  sicut pulvis turbine raptus ex area,  et sicut fumus de fumario.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן יִֽהְיוּ֙ כַּעֲנַן־בֹּ֔קֶר וְכַטַּ֖ל מַשְׁכִּ֣ים הֹלֵ֑ךְ כְּמֹץ֙ יְסֹעֵ֣ר מִגֹּ֔רֶן וּכְעָשָׁ֖ן מֵאֲרֻבָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore they shall be as a morning cloud, and as the early dew that passeth away, as the dust that is driven with a whirlwind out of the floor, and as the smoke out of the chimney.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää heidän oleman niinkuin aamu-utu ja varhain lankeeva kaste, joka raukee, niinkuin akanat, jotka puhalletaan pois luvasta, ja niinkuin savu totosta.
verses.king_james: Therefore they shall be as the morning cloud, and as the early dew that passeth away, as the chaff that is driven with the whirlwind out of the floor, and as the smoke out of the chimney.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem Dominus Deus tuus, ex terra Ægypti ;  et Deum absque me nescies,  et salvator non est præter me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֛י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם וֵאלֹהִ֤ים זוּלָתִי֙ לֹ֣א תֵדָ֔ע וּמוֹשִׁ֥יעַ אַ֖יִן בִּלְתִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I am the Lord thy God from the land of Egypt: and thou shalt know no God but me, and there is no saviour beside me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä olen Herra sinun Jumalas hamasta Egyptin maasta; ei tosin sinun pitäisi muuta jumaIaa tunteman paitsi minua, eikä yhtään vapahtajaa, vaan minua ainoaa.
verses.king_james: Yet I am the Lord thy God from the land of Egypt, and thou shalt know no god but me: for there is no saviour beside me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego cognovi te in deserto,  in terra solitudinis.
verses.douay_rheims: I knew thee in the desert, in the land of the wilderness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tunsin sinun korvessa, karkiassa maassa.
verses.king_james: I did know thee in the wilderness, in the land of great drought.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta pascua sua adimpleti sunt et saturati sunt ;  et levaverunt cor suum, et obliti sunt mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּמַרְעִיתָם֙ וַיִּשְׂבָּ֔עוּ שָׂבְע֖וּ וַיָּ֣רׇם לִבָּ֑ם עַל־כֵּ֖ן שְׁכֵחֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: According to their pastures they were filled, and were made full: and they lifted up their heart, and have forgotten me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta että he ovat ravitut, ja kyllänsä saaneet; he saivat kyllänsä ja heidän sydämensä paisui: Sentähden he minun unhottavat.
verses.king_james: According to their pasture, so were they filled; they were filled, and their heart was exalted; therefore have they forgotten me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego ero eis quasi leæna,  sicut pardus in via Assyriorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֱהִ֥י לָהֶ֖ם כְּמוֹ־שָׁ֑חַל כְּנָמֵ֖ר עַל־דֶּ֥רֶךְ אָשֽׁוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will be to them as a lioness, as a leopard in the way of the Assyrians.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä myös tahdon olla heidän kohtaansa niinkuin jalopeura, ja tahdon heitä väijyä niinkuin pardi tiellä.
verses.king_james: Therefore I will be unto them as a lion: as a leopard by the way will I observe them:

verses.latin_vulgate: Occurram eis quasi ursa raptis catulis,  et dirumpam interiora jecoris eorum,  et consumam eos ibi quasi leo :  bestia agri scindet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶפְגְּשֵׁם֙ כְּדֹ֣ב שַׁכּ֔וּל וְאֶקְרַ֖ע סְג֣וֹר לִבָּ֑ם וְאֹכְלֵ֥ם שָׁם֙ כְּלָבִ֔יא חַיַּ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה תְּבַקְּעֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will meet them as a bear that is robbed of her whelps, and I will rend the inner parts of their liver: and I will devour them there as a lion, the beast of the field shall tear them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon heitä kohdata niinkuin karhu, jonka pojat ovat otetut pois, ja reväistä heidän paatuneen sydämensä rikki, ja tahdon heidät siellä syödä ylös, niinkuin jalopeura; metsän pedot pitää heidät rikki repimän.
verses.king_james: I will meet them as a bear that is bereaved of her whelps, and will rend the caul of their heart, and there will I devour them like a lion: the wild beast shall tear them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Perditio tua, Israël : tantummodo in me auxilium tuum.
verses.douay_rheims: Destruction is thy own, O Israel: thy help is only in me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Itse sinä olet sinun kadotukses, Israel! Vaan minussa on sinun apus.
verses.king_james: O Israel, thou hast destroyed thyself; but in me is thine help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi est rex tuus ?  maxime nunc salvet te in omnibus urbibus tuis ;  et judices tui, de quibus dixisti :  Da mihi regem et principes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱהִ֤י מַלְכְּךָ֙ אֵפ֔וֹא וְיוֹשִׁיעֲךָ֖ בְּכׇל־עָרֶ֑יךָ וְשֹׁ֣פְטֶ֔יךָ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמַ֔רְתָּ תְּנָה־לִּ֖י מֶ֥לֶךְ וְשָׂרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Where is thy king? now especially let him save thee in all thy cities: and thy judges, of whom thou saidst: Give me kings and princes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Missä on sinun kuninkaas, joka sinua taitais auttaa kaikissa sinun kaupungeissas? Ja sinun tuomaris, joista sinä sanoit: Anna minulle kuningas ja päämiehiä.
verses.king_james: I will be thy king: where is any other that may save thee in all thy cities? and thy judges of whom thou saidst, Give me a king and princes?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dabo tibi regem in furore meo,  et auferam in indignatione mea.
verses.douay_rheims: I will give thee a king in my wrath, and will take him away in my indignation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tosin annoin sinulle kuninkaan minun vihassani, ja otan sen sinulta pois minun hirmuisuudessani.
verses.king_james: I gave thee a king in mine anger, and took him away in my wrath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Colligata est iniquitas Ephraim ;  absconditum peccatum ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: The iniquity of Ephraim is bound up, his sin is hidden.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephraimin pahateko on sidottu kokoon, ja hänen syntinsä ovat salatut.
verses.king_james: The iniquity of Ephraim is bound up; his sin is hid.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dolores parturientis venient ei :  ipse filius non sapiens :  nunc enim non stabit in contritione filiorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶבְלֵ֥י יוֹלֵדָ֖ה יָבֹ֣אוּ ל֑וֹ הוּא־בֵן֙ לֹ֣א חָכָ֔ם כִּי־עֵ֥ת לֹֽא־יַעֲמֹ֖ד בְּמִשְׁבַּ֥ר בָּנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sorrows of a woman in labour shall come upon him, he is an unwise son: for now he shall not stand in the breach of the children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänelle pitää tuleman synnyttäväisen kipu; hän on tyhmä lapsi, sillä ei hän taida sitä aikaa lasten synnyttämisessä pysyväinen olla.
verses.king_james: The sorrows of a travailing woman shall come upon him: he is an unwise son; for he should not stay long in the place of the breaking forth of children.

verses.latin_vulgate: De manu mortis liberabo eos ;  de morte redimam eos.  Ero mors tua, o mors !  morsus tuus ero, inferne !  consolatio abscondita est ab oculis meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִיַּ֤ד שְׁאוֹל֙ אֶפְדֵּ֔ם מִמָּ֖וֶת אֶגְאָלֵ֑ם אֱהִ֨י דְבָרֶ֜יךָ מָ֗וֶת אֱהִ֤י קׇֽטׇבְךָ֙ שְׁא֔וֹל נֹ֖חַם יִסָּתֵ֥ר מֵעֵינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will deliver them out of the hand of death. I will redeem them from death: O death, I will be thy death; O hell, I will be thy bite: comfort is hidden from my eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä tahdon heitä päästää helvetin vallasta, ja vapahtaa heitä kuolemasta. Kuolema, minä tahdon olla sinulle myrkky, helvetti, minä tahdon olla sinulle surma! Kuitenkin on se lohdutus minun silmäini edestä peitetty.
verses.king_james: I will ransom them from the power of the grave; I will redeem them from death: O death, I will be thy plagues; O grave, I will be thy destruction: repentance shall be hid from mine eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ipse inter fratres dividet :  adducet urentem ventum Dominus de deserto ascendentem,  et siccabit venas ejus,  et desolabit fontem ejus :  et ipse diripiet thesaurum omnis vasis desiderabilis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ה֔וּא בֵּ֥ין אַחִ֖ים יַפְרִ֑יא יָב֣וֹא קָדִים֩ ר֨וּחַ יְהֹוָ֜ה מִמִּדְבָּ֣ר עֹלֶ֗ה וְיֵב֤וֹשׁ מְקוֹרוֹ֙ וְיֶחֱרַ֣ב מַעְיָנ֔וֹ ה֣וּא יִשְׁסֶ֔ה אוֹצַ֖ר כׇּל־כְּלִ֥י חֶמְדָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because he shall make a separation between brothers: the Lord will bring a burning wind that shall rise from the desert, and it shall dry up his springs, and shall make his fountain desolate, and he shall carry off the treasure of every desirable vessel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hänen pitää veljesten vaiheella hedelmää tekemän: Herran itätuulen pitää tuleman korvesta, ja hänen kaivonsa pitää kurehtuman, ja hänen lähteensä kuivuman, sen pitää raateleman kaikkein kalleimmat kalut ja tavarat.
verses.king_james: Though he be fruitful among his brethren, an east wind shall come, the wind of the Lord shall come up from the wilderness, and his spring shall become dry, and his fountain shall be dried up: he shall spoil the treasure of all pleasant vessels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pereat Samaria, quoniam ad amaritudinem concitavit Deum suum !  in gladio pereant,  parvuli eorum elidantur,  et fœtæ ejus discindantur !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֶּאְשַׁם֙ שֹׁמְר֔וֹן כִּ֥י מָרְתָ֖ה בֵּאלֹהֶ֑יהָ בַּחֶ֣רֶב יִפֹּ֔לוּ עֹלְלֵיהֶ֣ם יְרֻטָּ֔שׁוּ וְהָרִיּוֹתָ֖יו יְבֻקָּֽעוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let Samaria perish, because she hath stirred up her God to bitterness: let them perish by the sword, let their little ones be dashed, and let the women with child be ripped up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Samaria pitää autioksi tuleman, sillä hän on Jumalallensa kovakorvainen ollut; heidän pitää miekalla lankeeman, ja heidän nuoret lapsensa paiskattaman rikki, ja heidän raskaat vaimonsa pitää reväistämän rikki.
verses.king_james: Samaria shall become desolate; for she hath rebelled against her God: they shall fall by the sword: their infants shall be dashed in pieces, and their women with child shall be ripped up.
